Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Suriel's glass bead]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel gave Lindon a glass bead with a blue flame that shines like a tiny star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon possesses Suriel's glass marble.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's core became as big as Suriel’s marble after advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Suriel's glass marble is a smooth, round ball with a single blue candle-flame flickering in the center.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Suriel's marble is smooth and warm.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel's marble is warm, comforting to spiritual sense, and brings a sense of order.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon carries Suriel's marble in his pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Suriel's marble provides a faint blue candle-glow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel's marble will return to Lindon without fail.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue is playing with Suriel's marble.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon tried not to reach for Suriel’s marble.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon uses Suriel’s marble to steel himself.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
